title: Ciasi
content:

{{Quote|Chuba pitdroid!|Slide Paramita, a Ciasi, speaking Huttese|audio=SlideParamitaPitdroid.flac|<ref name="E1R" />}}
The '''Ciasi''' were a [[Rodent/Legends|rodent]]-like [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with tall, pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]] and thin, trunk-like [[Nose/Legends|noses]]. Ciasi could be found with gray-[[Color/Legends|colored]] skin and could grow prominent [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]]. One famous Ciasi was the thin [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Slide Paramita]], who performed in [[Podracing/Legends|Podraces]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Ciasi_2.png|thumb|left|150px|Ciasi had long, slender tails.]]
The Ciasi<ref name="SWE">{{CSWECite|III|12|Paramita, Slide}}</ref> were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] bipedal [[Species/Legends|species]] who had a fairly [[Rodent/Legends|rodent]]-like appearance. Ciasi had thin torsos, and their backs had a slight bend in them, thus appearing as if they were always leaning forward.<ref name="E1R" />

The Ciasi also had rather thin [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] that held them upright, including double-jointed legs that ended in three slender toes; the Ciasi stood upon those toes as opposed to the flats of their feet. The Ciasi's long, slender arms led to hands with four thick digits—three fingers and a short thumb. Ciasi also had thin tapered tails that came from their rear, which were held slightly above the ground.<ref name="E1R" />

On their face, Ciasi had long, thin and trunk-like [[Nose/Legends|noses]] with two nostrils on the end. Their [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] were located below the trunk, and it was from there that the Ciasi could grow sharp, pointed [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]]. Ciasi had round and beady [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; some Ciasi, such as [[Slide Paramita]], had black eyes. Paramita also exhibited grayish-brown [[Color/Legends|colorerd]] skin. Ciasi also had tall, pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]] that stuck out of the tops of their heads.<ref name="E1R" />

==History==
The Ciasi evolved somewhere in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and individuals could be spotted in the galactic community<ref name="E1R" /> by as early as [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="chrono">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. The racing season presented in the [[Star Wars video games|game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'' must have taken place during this year due to the appearances of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which correspond to ''The Phantom Menace''.</ref>

==Ciasi in the galaxy==
{{Quote|Look for my Podracer when I lap you!|Slide Paramita, a Ciasi Podracer pilot, taunting other Podracer pilots|translated=1|audio=SlideParamita-taunt.flac|<ref name="E1R" />}}
[[File:Slideparamitaface.png|thumb|right|150px|Slide Paramita, Ciasi Podracer pilot]]
At least one Ciasi, Slide Paramita, displayed athletic prowess both physically and mentally. Paramita made it as far as the intergalactic [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] circuits<ref name="E1R" /> by 32 BBY,<ref name="chrono" /> where<ref name="E1R" /> he<ref name="ReusedBlog">{{SW|url=news/back-from-the-drawing-board-recycled-star-wars-aliens|text=Back from the Drawing Board: Recycled ''Star Wars'' Aliens|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref> became well adapted to [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Racing (disambiguation)|racing]], and gained fame on the icy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]]. Paramita achieved success on an invitational course known as the [[Ando Prime Centrum/Legends|Ando Prime Centrum]],<ref name="E1R" /> as well as a [[Ando Prime drag course 1|drag racing course]] on the planet.<ref name="E1RGC">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{C|[[Wikipedia:Game Boy Color|Game Boy Color]] version}}</ref> However, Paramita had a reputation for being an easily angered [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] elitist.<ref name="SWE" /> Paramita could also speak [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]].<ref name="E1R" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:ParamitaConcept.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Ciasi concept art from ''The Phantom Menace'']]
The Ciasi species first appeared via Slide Paramita in concept art and early scripts for the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] as a Podracer pilot who hailed, along with his entire species, from the planet [[Tund/Legends|Tund]]. Ultimately, he was cut from the script,<ref name="DB1">{{DB|organization|boontapodrace|Boonta Eve Classic Podracers}}</ref> although Tund remained as the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of another Podracer pilot, [[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]].<ref name="DB2">{{DB|character|benquadinaros|Quadinaros, Ben}}</ref> Paramita, like several other scrapped Podracers, received his first actual appearance in the 1999 [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]''.<ref name="E1R" />

The name Ciasi first publicly appeared in a [[2006]] [[Star Wars: Blogs]] article titled "Alien species concepts that became part of the SW universe," which was written by [[Tim Veekhoven]] as a part of his Source Blog series. The blog detailed several Podracer [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who did not make into the final script for the 1999 film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], using material that may have come from early draft material for ''The Phantom Menace''.<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|teekay-421|69|Alien species concepts that became part of the SW universe}}</ref>

However, the species name was not considered [[canon]] at the time, due to the fact that the information may have come from older material that was never finalized, as well as doubt surrounding the nature of the information's authenticity overall. With the release of ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]], the Ciasi were mentioned again under Slide Paramita's entry, canonizing Paramita's species from the blog entry.<ref name="SWE" />
